title: Income Tax Department Clarifies Due Dates for AY 2026-27 Tax Audit and Belated Returns
content:
# Income Tax Department Clarifies Due Dates for AY 2026-27 Tax Audit and Belated Returns

Ek important update hai! The Income Tax Department, Ministry of Finance, Government of India, ne Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 ke liye kuch due dates clarify kiye hain. Yeh clarifications June 13, 2026, ko issued kiye gaye hain.

Yeh update Financial Year (FY) 2025-26 (AY 2026-27) ke liye tax audit report aur belated returns filing ke liye important dates specify karta hai.

*   **Tax Audit Report Filing (FY 2025-26 / AY 2026-27):**
    *   Tax audit report ko Income Tax Act, 1961 ke prescribed form mein hi file karna hoga.
    *   Tax audit report furnish karne ki due date Income Tax Return (ITR) filing ki due date se ek mahina pehle hai.
    *   For example, agar ITR ki due date October 31, 2026 hai, toh tax audit report September 30, 2026 tak file karna hoga.
    *   Transfer pricing cases mein, jahaan ITR ki due date November 30, 2026 hai, tax audit report October 31, 2026 tak file karna hoga.

*   **Belated Return Filing (AY 2026-27):**
    *   AY 2026-27 ke liye belated return December 31, 2026 ko ya assessment complete hone se pehle, jo bhi pehle ho, uss tak furnish kiya ja sakta hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://incometax.gov.in/)

*Published on: 13 June 2026*
